CVE-2019-12412.title: A flaw in the libapreq2 v2.07 to v2.13 multipart parser can defer ...
CVE-2019-12412.summary: A flaw in the libapreq2 v2.07 to v2.13 multipart parser can deference a null pointer leading to a process crash. A remote attacker could send a request causing a process crash which could lead to a denial of service attack.

CVE-2022-22728.title: A flaw in Apache libapreq2 versions 2.16 and earlier could cause  ...
CVE-2022-22728.summary: A flaw in Apache libapreq2 versions 2.16 and earlier could cause a buffer overflow while processing multipart form uploads. A remote attacker could send a request causing a process crash which could lead to a denial of service attack.
